category_sources: source_facts.description identifies GNU debugger for x86_64-elf cross development; official GDB page describes GDB as the GNU Project debugger.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is x86_64-elf-gdb; source_facts.description identifies it as GNU debugger for x86_64-elf cross development.
docs_sources: Official GNU GDB documentation page links online manuals; Sourceware hosts the current Debugging with GDB manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Sourceware Current GDB page gives read-only git clone URL https://sourceware.org/git/binutils-gdb.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions GNU debugger and x86_64-elf cross development; official GDB page describes debugger capabilities.
